allow: Bash(powershell -command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -like '*FEELWORLD*' -or $_.FriendlyName -like '*feel*' -or $_.FriendlyName -like '*05*' } | Select-Object FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId | Format-List" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice -Class Bluetooth | Select-Object FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId | Format-List")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python -c "from bleak import BleakClient, BleakScanner; print\(''bleak OK''\)")
